reportedIssues: Game cards on the right edge of both 'BetRivers Exclusive Games' and 'Top Played New Games' sections are heavily clipped, cutting off game titles (e.g., 'MAGNI PHO...', 'MUN MI', 'HYPERC PYRAMIDI', 'DAR WATE THE CURS'). The content is not readable and makes the UI look broken rather than intentionally scrollable.
The top navigation tab 'Hot Ga...' is visibly truncated, with the label cut off mid-word. This makes the tab label unreadable.
The partially visible game cards on the right edge lack any visible scroll indicator (e.g., arrows, dots, or a scrollbar), making it unclear to users that the row is horizontally scrollable.
The 'EXCLUSIVE' badge overlays the top-left corner of each game card and partially obscures game artwork, reducing visual quality of the thumbnails.

expected.reasoning: None of the reported issues describe a highlighted category or navigation state problem; they focus on clipping, truncation, scrolling indicators, and badge overlays instead.
